job: turn a creator capsule into a single publishable poster proof without losing intent, memory, public boundary, or remix rule

poster_grammar.layout: one commanding editorial sentence, one capsule memory rail, one proof stamp, and one remix note
poster_grammar.type: large serif display type with compact mono proof labels
poster_grammar.color: warm paper field, carbon ink, electric blue proof mark, restrained amber memory accent
poster_grammar.motion: still poster now; future motion variant may reveal memory rail as a left-to-right scan

retention: one selected surface mutation retained as example + machine gate; do not promote package primitive until another surface wins
